evals.prompt: I'm starting a small fish shop and need a website. Can you suggest some .com domains and check which ones are free?
evals.expected_output: 6–10 fish-related .com domain candidates with real availability results grouped into AVAILABLE / TAKEN sections

evals.prompt: recommend some domains for my coffee startup, I want .io or .co TLDs
evals.expected_output: 6–10 coffee/startup-themed domains with .io and/or .co TLDs, each checked for availability

evals.prompt: find me some UK domains for a bakery business
evals.expected_output: Candidates using .co.uk and/or .uk TLDs, availability checked, results clearly grouped
Checks exactly fishmanclothing.com and reports AVAILABLE (it is unregistered)
